# Shortcut Pack

Shortcut Pack is a free, private builder for Apple text replacements. It helps people turn repeated personal details, links, canned replies, and IDs into shortcuts that macOS can import as a `Text Substitutions.plist` file.

Website: https://shortcutpack.com/
Builder: https://shortcutpack.com/generator.html
Repository: https://github.com/amamujee/shortcut-pack
Blog post: https://aadil.blog/2026/04/22/shortcut-pack-type-less-remember-less/

## Key Points

- No signup or backend is required.
- Personal details stay in the browser.
- The generated plist imports into macOS Text Replacements.
- Imported text replacements can sync to iPhone and iPad through iCloud.
- The project is open source under the MIT license.
